plist.dict:
NSMicrophoneUsageDescription We need access to your microphone for AI Voice Assistant. NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription We need access to your gallery to let you pick a profile picture. NSCameraUsageDescription We need access to your camera to let you take a profile picture.
CADisableMinimumFrameDurationOnPhone
CFBundleDevelopmentRegion $(DEVELOPMENT_LANGUAGE) ... UIMainStoryboardFile Main UISupportedInterfaceOrientations
UIInterfaceOrientationPortrait UIInterfaceOrientationLandscapeLeft UIInterfaceOrientationLandscapeRight
UISupportedInterfaceOrientations~ipad
UIInterfaceOrientationPortrait UIInterfaceOrientationPortraitUpsideDown UIInterfaceOrientationLandscapeLeft UIInterfaceOrientationLandscapeRight
